mapper.sql: select m.id, m.project_id, m.submit_time, m.contact_name, m.contact_phone, m.result_type, m.extra_data::text as extra_data, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from proj_material m
mapper.select: select m.id, m.project_id, m.submit_time, m.contact_name, m.contact_phone, m.result_type, m.extra_data::text as extra_data, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, p.project_name from proj_material m left join proj_project p on p.id = m.project_id where m.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into proj_material( project_id, submit_time, contact_name, contact_phone, result_type, extra_data, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{projectId}, #{submitTime}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{resultType}, #{extraData}::jsonb, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.delete:
update proj_material set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
